description: Hard reset the Worker 1 Ollama/chat/cockpit connection stack and rebuild it from fresh local validation. Website connector found in larielsystems/chat.html still uses CHAT_BACKEND=https://jawed-lapel-dispersed.ngrok-free.dev with local bridge fallback, and cockpit frontend config still points backendBaseUrl at the same stale public base. Remove stale local chat shim listeners, rediscover a working Ollama-backed upstream, republish website chat, refresh cockpit backend routing if a validated public cockpit endpoint exists, request a cockpit hard reset, and return proof.
